reviews.review_description: First, I only played the first 9 holes. I didn't like that you couldn't walk around the greens. There was one hole that had a couple hills you could not see the other side. It would have been nice to walk over to see if it was a green or an abyss, since both could be possible. You would hit the ball differently depending on the situation. The graphics were remedial. Play was mediocre. Second, my bias could play into this review from playing another mini golf game for several years that leaves me lacking for nothing.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for leaving an honest review, sorry it didn't reach your expectation.

reviews.review_description: Compared to others,  terribly frustrating and glitchy. The ball jumps, curves, and rolls when it physically should not. Played with a friend, and we both got frustrated with it.
Ts game is tuff twin 💋

Worked fine for about 10 mins, then the trigger that readys the club suddenly started making me or the ball jump around. Ball frequently gets positioned outside boundary when I teleport to it.
Hi, thanks for responding so quickly, really appreciate it! So I've been able to nail down exactly when this occurs: I'm in Ocean course, with a boundary set to my room, not seated. So I arm the club by squeezing the grip trigger with my left middle finger. However, when I squeeze the index finger trigger to form a true grip (I don't like having my index finger extended), the ball jumps to the edge of the boundary or just beyond it. Is that expected?

Ok, I think it *is*expected because what's happening is that when the club is armed, both index finger triggers remain active for transport! And so as I try to grip the club with both hands, I'm actually transporting a very short distance which makes the ball appear to jump. I suggest that when the club is armed, the transport triggers be deactivated. You certainly don't need to be transported when you're about to hit the ball.

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry to hear that, could you please edit your review and add more info so I could fix it? was it in SP or MP mode? and in which map? feel free to join the discord channel if you like to give the feedback and help https://discord.gg/ZGAHEuA
For now, I say reset your boundary and restart your HMD and see if it will fixed, this is the first time I;m hearing about this issue.

reviews.review_description: When will there be any additional courses available? I like current courses, but am “burned out” from playing.

developer_response.body: Hi, I'm a solo developer, I will be able to add more courses if the game sells well, but giving 2 star isn't going to help on that regard. it will just drive people away.  I’m glad you enjoyed the game, and I would appreciate your support so I could deliver a better product.

reviews.review_description: A LOT of glitches. Also my husband bought this and didn’t like it and could NOT get a refund. We have easily received refunds before on games so I’m not sure what the issue is. He just bought the game last night.  He was on a chat with someone for about 30 minutes and finally just told them to forget it. The person kept asking the same questions over and over.

developer_response.body:
Edit: those bugs has been fixed, hopefully you will give the game another chance sorry it took so long to fix the issue.
Hi, sorry to hear that, the refund is from meta side, but do let him contact me on discord and I will try to refund him personally. https://discord.gg/ZGAHEuA
It would've been helpful if you described the issue you guys faced, sometimes bugs happens when the internet is slow, just exit from both headsets and make a new game to solve the issue.

reviews.review_title: Much better than I thought it would be.
reviews.review_description: As a big fan of walkabout mini golf I thought to myself this is going to be a waste of time but what the hay it was free to download so why not give it a try.  Let's start with the positives.  Graphics were very good not walkabout quality but very good.  A very big positive for me was the elevations of the greens and how easy it was to recognize the breaks of the greens.  No other golf game can match this.  None!   Now the big negative for me that all other golf games except for Walkabout minigolf have.  The ball feels like I'm hitting a marshmallow.  I know it's virtual reality, but Walkabout mini golf does not have this problem and is the only game that doesn't.  When I hit a putt in walkabout there is a satisfying clicking noise and slight feedback in the controller that I actually feel like I have hit the ball.  If you address this and fix it I will change my rating to 5 stars.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, I will see what I can do.

reviews.review_description:
It's a refreshing change from the other more mainstream mini golf game.
Decent little courses
Keep up the good work

Hopefully you will bring multiplayer up to at least 4 players

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time and leaving your feedback, I will see what I can do to enhance the game with updates.

reviews.review_description:
I guess it's inevitable that all new mini golf games will be compared to Walkabout Mini Golf, so I'm not going to do that. 
 
I have only played the 9 free holes. 
 
Thoughts that occured on my first playthrough experience: 
1. Why is there a countdown before the game starts. It's the number of strokes that count, not the finishing time, right? 
2. Sometimes the ball rolls far away, sometimes not that far. Then again, I can't guarantee that my swing is consistent. Slopes and lie ofcourse also affects the shot. 
3. Short puts feels more accurate. 
4. In my opinion, the club doesn't look as great as the rest of the game. But that's just cosmetics, and on a positive note, if I could throw away the club in frustration after making a really bad shot I wouldn't miss it. 😉
5. All holes seems to be located in a "hollow", so even if I miss my putt the ball often rolls back closer to the hole, and sometimes in the hole. Hope not all courses are designed that way. 
6. Finishing at +7, room for improvement. I definitely have to play again, that was fun. 
 
Now that I've played 10 rounds, or so, I have become a better player, but still wonder about that countdown. 
 
Making a hole-in-one is always satisfying. I'll be keeping my eyes on this game. It can become an ace.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for taking the time and leaving your feedback, 
1- Right, only the stroke counts.
2- Hopefully with future updates, the physics will be more enhanced. 
5- This first level is easy and most holes are located in the hollow. the rest 3 levels are not, and each has its own feature, you may check youtube for a walk-through over the rest of the maps. 
Glad you had fun playing the game, thank you for leaving a review.

developer_response.body: Hello, I will try to see if I can reproduce the bug. this is the first time I'm hearing about this issue. thanks for letting me know. feel free to join the discord to follow up regarding this  bug https://discord.gg/ZGAHEuA

reviews.review_description: Gameplay: good. Controllers and movement: great. Difficulty: Enjoyable. BUT, if what makes this game something different and original are the dinosaurs... well, it would be nice to see them in the demo. Otherwise it happens exactly like any other of the free versions. I would like to share some ideas related to golf and dinosaurs, but without a single dinosaur. In my experience... well, I don't know.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for leaving a review, glad you enjoyed the game, 
The reason why the dinosaur isn't part of the demo since there are 3 detailed levels for $12 which I expect its fair to ask to support the dev behind this game, its a game made by a solo dev after all so adding more content isn't easy. 
And afaik, you can buy the game and if you don't like it, you may ask for a refund, but I'm sure you will like it.

reviews.review_title: It’s a great start and a fun game
reviews.review_description:
Mini golf is so fun in VR. 
This isn’t on the same level as Walkabout yet, but a great start.
Unique and different experience. I recommend to anyone who enjoys Walkabout 
 Physics are good.  Just a few inconsistencies in the way the ball moves. Thought I hit something invisible a couple time.

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving your feedback, glad you enjoyed the game. I will push some updates soon to enhance the physics and fix some of the current issues.

reviews.review_description: I downloaded the free version so only had 9 holes on the Ocean course. It is a bit glitchy and you have to hit the ball so hard. Seems way too hard for a mini golf course. Seems to have good potential and willing to try it more but don’t think I want to buy more courses just yet.

developer_response.body: Hi MichSink, there is an option to reduce the friction of the land from advance option menu, that might help, thanks for taking the time and leaving a review, I will try to enhance game with more updates.

reviews.review_description:
So I have now had a chance to play all the DLC courses! 

I love the fact these courses are so immersive with moving characters and the graphics are stunning. 

I especially love the snow course! One of the harder courses in my opinion. 

If I was to say anything as constructive criticism it would be I feel the ball needs a little more flow to it, seems it can become quite grippy at times! 

But overall it’s a fabulous course full of eye candy! Can’t wait for future DLC content and love you can also play this with another player 😁

Well done lovely little hidden gem 💎 of a game!

So 5 Stars ⭐️ for the visual eye candy, but definitely needs some work on the pace of the ball from the power of your swing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving a review, glad you enjoined the game.

reviews.review_description:
Nice little Golf game with lots of potential.
The Developers have done a great job on the visuals of the surroundings.
I especially like the Antarctic course. The Graphics of the whale jumping is great, also the detail in the penguins dotted around are amazing.
Takes a bit of getting used to the putting, I’m used to walkabout golf.
There are 4 courses each with a different theme. 
Definitely worth trying.

Note for Developer
The ball could flow a little bit smoother, seems to be a little bit gripping,  but great work so far.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review, there is a friction adjustment on the advance section, this should smooth the movement a bit. I will try to enhance the game more.
